titleStmt.title: SII 41.259: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 259. (A.R. No. 477 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Records that Vaḷḷuvanpākkiḻān Dēvan alias Teluṅgarāyan made a gift of 70 kāsu for food offerings. The sabhā of Perumūr alias Rājanārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Naḍuvinmalai Perumūrnāḍu received the gift for the service. The donor belonged to Va[ḷḷu]vanpākkam in Oḻugaiyūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Paḍuvūr-kōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉākat tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟkku 3 10 2 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ koṭṭattup paḻaiyanūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyanūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkil Aṇṭamuṟanimintaruḷiya nāyanārkkut tiruvantit tiru
voṭṭattukkup piṭṭamutu Amutuceytaruḷukaikku Imaṇṭalattu paṭuvūr koṭṭattu Oḻukaiyūr nāṭṭu vaḷḷuvanpākkattu vaḷḷuvanpākkiḻān tevanāṉa teluṅkārayaṉ makaṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāna vāṇakovaraiyan pakkal Innāyanārkku naṭuviṉmalaiperumurnāṭṭup perumurāna Irācanārāyaṇaccaturvetimaṅkalattu mahācapaiyom Innimantañ celuttukaikkuk kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu 7 10 Ippaḻaṅkācu
Eḻupatuṅ kaikkoṇṭu piṭṭamutu Amutu ceytaruḷa nāḷoṉṟukku Añcupattām Ūṟkālāle kuṟuṇi nānāḻi Uriy nellum neyyamutu Uḻakkum Uppu Āḻākkum Orupalakkaruppukkaṭṭiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākkuppattum Ilaiyamutu paṟṟukkālum cantiratittavarai celuttakkaṭavomākavum Orukuṭi Iruntatākilum Irunta kuṭiye celuttak kaṭavatākavum Ūraiviṭṭup puṟampe poyiruntomā
kilum Iruntiṭā nāḷile Iruntu celuttak kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi Innimantañ celuttak kaṭavomākac cammatittom perumurāṉa Irācanārāyaṇac caturvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom
Digital edition of SII 41.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
